scripts.dev: npm run manifest && concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm:dev -w server" "npm:dev -w client"
scripts.dev:client: npm run manifest && npm run dev -w client
scripts.build: npm run manifest && npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.build:client: npm run manifest && npm run build -w client
scripts.serve: cross-env SERVE_CLIENT=1 NODE_ENV=production npm run start -w server
scripts.start: npm run build:client && npm run serve
scripts.test: npm run manifest && npm run test -w server && npx tsx scripts/check-surfaces.mjs
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p client/tsconfig.json
